name: talkable
description: Voice-controlled Codex Chrome extension and local backend.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @talkable/shared && npm run build -w @talkable/server && npm run build -w @talkable/extension
scripts.check: npm run check -w @talkable/shared && npm run build -w @talkable/shared && npm run check -w @talkable/server && npm run check -w @talkable/extension
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,react -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:react"
